name: semantic-shield
description: AI skill safety validation API — real human experts vet skills, plugins, and MCP tools for security risks. Requires your Semantic Shield API key for authentication. Query trust scores, submit evaluation inquiries, and get real-time safety verdicts before installing anything in your AI agents.
longDescription: Semantic Shield is a security-first skill that protects AI agents, bots, and users from unsafe skills, plugins, and tools. Every skill in the registry is vetted by US-based security experts with 30+ years of experience (including Homeland Security). Agents and developers can query any skill's safety profile via API or MCP — getting a safety score (0–100), risk level, threat details, and clear install/reject recommendation. Unvetted skills can be submitted for expert evaluation. Continuous 0-day threat monitoring keeps assessments current. Authentication requires your Semantic Shield API key (generated at signup, scoped to your account, revocable at any time). Only skill identifiers and public URLs are transmitted — no user PII, secrets, or environment variables are ever collected.

env.name: SEMANTIC_SHIELD_API_KEY
env.description: Your Semantic Shield API key. Generated at signup at https://dashboard.simplysemantics.com. Scoped to your account only. Revocable at any time from the dashboard.

endpoints.description: Search for vetted skills by name or provider (free, no quota cost)

input.q: string — skill name or ID to search for (partial match)

endpoints.description: Get full trust details for a specific skill (counts against lookup quota)

output.recommendation: string — safe to install|install with caution|do not install

endpoints.description: Submit an unvetted skill for expert security evaluation (counts against inquiry quota). Only public skill identifiers and URLs accepted — never submit secrets or private URLs.

input.skill_url: string — optional public URL to the skill (marketplace listing, GitHub repo, or docs page only)

free.description: Query skill safety profiles and submit limited evaluation inquiries

pro.description: Priority evaluations, full reports, webhook alerts, email support

enterprise.description: Unlimited access, private queue, SLA, dedicated support, and custom integrations

features: Real-time skill safety lookups via API — safety score, risk level, and recommendation
100% REAL human security experts — US-based with 30+ years experience including Homeland Security
Submit unvetted skills for expert evaluation with tracked request lifecycle
Safety scoring 0–100 with risk levels: critical, high, medium, low, safe
Threat detection for prompt injection, data exfiltration, over-privileged permissions, and more
Continuous 0-day vulnerability monitoring keeps assessments current
Webhook alerts for Pro+ tiers when threats are detected on previously vetted skills
Free search endpoint — find skills by name or provider at no quota cost
API-key auth — per-account, scoped, revocable at any time from the dashboard
MCP-compatible endpoints for autonomous AI agent decision-making
Interactive dashboard with usage metrics, history, and settings

privacy.dataSent: Only skill identifiers (skill_id), provider names (provider), and optionally a public skill URL (skill_url) when submitting for evaluation. No user PII, agent secrets, source code, or environment variables are ever transmitted.
privacy.dataNotSent: No user credentials, private keys, environment variables, file contents, agent configuration, or personal information of any kind.
privacy.dataRetention: Skill safety assessments are public verdicts stored in the registry. Account usage metrics (lookup/inquiry counts) are stored in your account only.
privacy.apiKeyHandling: Your SEMANTIC_SHIELD_API_KEY is used solely for request authentication. It is never logged in plaintext, shared, or transmitted to third parties. Logs store a hash of your key for rate-limiting only.
privacy.webhooks: Pro+ tiers only. You control the webhook URL and can disable it at any time. Webhook payloads contain only skill_id, provider, safety_score, and risk_level. Free tier users do not have webhooks.
privacy.crossServiceSharing: None. Your Semantic Shield data is not shared with other Simply Semantics services.
privacy.logging: API requests are logged for rate-limiting and abuse prevention. Logs contain API key hash (not the key), endpoint, skill_id, provider, and timestamp. Retained for 30 days.

security.authMethod: x-api-key header — per-account API key generated at signup, scoped to Semantic Shield only, revocable at any time
